top_signals.title: Latest ‘Star Wars’ Film ‘Mandalorian’ Debuts at $102 Million
top_signals.summary: The Mandalorian and Grogu, the first film in the Star Wars franchise in seven years, was the highest-grossing movie in the US and Canada over the four-day holiday weekend with $102 million in ticket sales.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
